# Android Emulator Internal Testing

Public site:
https://RenaWells.github.io/adawita-android-emulator/

This is a GTK/libadwaita Android Emulator manager for Linux.
It supports native glibc systems and Alpine/musl through an Arch chroot runtime.

Key features:
- Android SDK detection
- Setup wizard for SDK, Arch chroot, and gaming AVD setup
- Gaming profile for Gaming_API_30
- Controller detection
- AppImage packaging
- GitHub Pages website

Recommended AVD:
Gaming_API_30

AppImage download:
https://RenaWells.github.io/adawita-android-emulator/downloads/Android_Emulator-x86_64.AppImage
